verdict.judge_question_strategy_notes: The judge did not initiate any discussion rounds. While the initial assessments were unanimous and high-confidence, the judge missed an opportunity to verify the specific script (linguistic) or the driving side (regulatory) to ensure robustness. The strategy was passive.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the unanimous evidence from all five agents to reach the correct conclusion. The reasoning accurately cited the specific visual cues (Thai script, yellow center line, utility poles) that led to the identification of Thailand.
